_readme: contacts.json — network mini-CRM (TEMPLATE). Copy to profile/contacts.json (gitignored), or let /jobops-intake build it.
This file is other people's PII: never commit it and never send it to any external service; agents read it locally only.
warmth: warm = would take your call this week | dormant = past tie worth reviving | target-adjacent = at or near a target company, not yet known personally
history entries look like: {"date": "2026-07-02", "what": "coffee chat re: AI roles", "outcome": "intro promised"}
